Page 102 - SOUPS & BROTHS

Brussels Sprouts and Bacon Soup

Ingredients:
- 1 lb (450g) brussels sprouts, hal
  ved and trimmed
- 6 slices bacon, chopped
- 1 medium onion, diced
- 3 cloves garlic, minced
- 4 cups vegetable broth
- 1 cup heavy cream
- 2 tablespoons butter
- Salt and black pepper to taste
- 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg
- Fresh thyme for garnish

Instructions:
In a large pot, cook bacon until crispy. Remove and drain.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes. 25
Add garlic and cook 1 minute more.
Add brussels sprouts and broth, bring to boil.
Reduce heat and simmer 20 minutes until sprouts are tender.
Stir in cream and nutmeg.
Season with salt and pepper.
Blend soup if smoother texture desired.
Top with bacon bits and thyme.
Serves 4-6.

- continued next page -
